text:
AFLIBER  Atlas of the Flora Iberica database  


 Read the compilation process of the dataset at Global Ecology and Biogeography




Visualize and download AFLIBER data interactively at the AFLIBER Shinyapp


 To access the dataset head to Dryad Digital Repository

02/2025 AFLIBER shinyapp has new features
Maps are now interactive, and geographic lookup is implemented. Learn more here.

title: AFLIBER
text:
This work was published as a datapaper in 07/2021. Check it out here



The new paper has been coauthored by:   Ignacio Ramos-Gutiérrez, Herlander Lima, Santiago Pajarón, Carlos Romero-Zarco, Llorenç Sáez, Luciano Pataro, Rafael Molina-Venegas, Miguel Á. Rodríguez, Juan Carlos Moreno-Saiz



The new dataset incorporates 1,824,549 occurrences for 6,456 native species with a 10 x 10 km resolution.

title: AFLIBER
text:
